---
title: "Methodology"
---


# UGC
```
`\textbf{Special Criteria Score (75\% weight):}`  
`\begin{equation}`  
`S_{SC} = 75 \sum_{i=1}^{4} w_i \cdot SC_i`  
`\end{equation}`  
`\text{where } w_1 = w_2 = w_3 = 0.30 \text{ and } w_4 = 0.10``\textbf{Other Criteria Score (25\% weight):}`  
`\begin{equation}`  
`S_{OC} = 25 \cdot \frac{\sum_{j=1}^{27} OC_j}{27}`  
`\end{equation}``\textbf{Total Score:}`  
`\begin{equation}`  
`\text{Total Score} = S_{SC} + S_{OC}`  
	`\end{equation}`
```

# Ads
```
\textbf{Special Criteria Score (75\% weight):}
\begin{equation}
S_{SC} = 75 \sum_{i=1}^{3} w_i \cdot SC_i
\end{equation}
\text{where } w_1 = 0.50, w_2 = 0.30, \text{ and } w_3 = 0.20

\\

\textbf{Other Criteria Score (25\% weight):}
\begin{equation}
S_{OC} = 25 \cdot \frac{\sum_{j=1}^{34} OC_j}{34}
\end{equation}

\textbf{Total Score:}
\begin{equation}
\text{Total Score} = S_{SC} + S_{OC}
\end{equation}

\textbf{Scoring Rules:}
\begin{itemize}
\item Special Criteria: $SC_i \in \{0, 0.5, 1\}$ where 0.5 is awarded for partial ad data
\item Other Criteria: $OC_j \in \{0, 0.5, 1\}$ where 0.5 is awarded when feature is available through only API or GUI, and 1.0 when available through both
\end{itemize}

```




::: {.callout-note}
## Score Interpretation
- **75-100%**: Excellent compliance
- **50-74%**: Moderate compliance
- **25-49%**: Limited compliance
- **0-24%**: Poor compliance
:::
